zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡中偏强运行
zh.content:
AVAX/USD当前报价6.9156，日内波动区间较窄，价格始终运行于20日均线6.86772上方，显示短线多头仍占据一定优势。虽然24小时微跌0.14%，但整体回调幅度有限，市场仍维持震荡偏强格局，短期趋势尚未出现明显转弱信号。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值为0.0083888991，处于零轴上方，表明多头动能依然存在，不过由于未提供信号线与RSI数据，暂时无法进一步确认上涨力度是否持续增强。目前价格距离日内高点仅一步之遥，说明市场观望情绪较浓，等待新的方向选择。

支撑方面，可重点关注6.9059附近的日内低点，其次关注20日均线6.8677一带，若跌破均线，则短线可能转入整理。阻力则首先位于6.9226附近，若放量突破该位置，有机会进一步挑战6.95至7.00整数关口，打开新的上涨空间。

操作策略上，稳健投资者可等待价格有效突破6.9226后顺势跟进，以确认多头延续；若价格回落至6.87至6.91区域并企稳，也可关注低吸机会。若跌破20日均线并持续走弱，则建议控制仓位，耐心等待新的企稳信号，再考虑重新布局。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is trading in a relatively tight range near 6.92 after a modest 24-hour decline, suggesting that short-term momentum remains balanced rather than decisively bearish. The current price continues to hold above the 20-period simple moving average at 6.86772, which indicates that buyers still maintain a slight technical advantage despite recent hesitation. The narrow daily high-low range also reflects reduced volatility, often a precursor to a stronger directional move once fresh market participation emerges.

Although the RSI reading is unavailable, the positive MACD value of 0.0083888991 points to underlying bullish momentum that has not yet fully faded. Without a signal line, confirmation remains limited, so traders should avoid relying on MACD alone. The combination of price stability above the moving average and a positive momentum reading suggests cautious optimism, but conviction will likely require expanding trading volume and a sustained push above recent intraday highs.

From a technical perspective, immediate support can be identified around 6.90, followed by the SMA region near 6.87, where buyers may attempt to defend the prevailing trend. A break below these levels could expose additional downside pressure and encourage profit-taking. On the upside, resistance begins around 6.92 and extends toward the psychological 7.00 level. A convincing breakout above that area would strengthen the case for continued recovery and potentially attract additional momentum-driven buying.

For traders, patience remains an important part of the current setup. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for confirmation through either a breakout above resistance or a successful retest of support before entering new positions. Short-term traders can monitor price reactions around the 6.90 support zone for potential buying opportunities while maintaining disciplined risk management. Investors with a longer time horizon may continue accumulating gradually, provided Avalanche remains above its moving average and broader cryptocurrency market sentiment stays constructive.
